## Summary | 变更摘要

Describe what this PR changes.  
请简要说明本次 PR 改了什么。

## Motivation | 背景与目的

Why is this change needed?  
为什么需要这个改动？

## Type of Change | 变更类型

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore

## Scope | 影响范围

List the affected modules, pages, services, or APIs.  
请列出受影响的模块、页面、服务或 API。

## Testing | 测试命令与结果

List commands and results.  
请列出执行过的测试命令与结果。

```text
flutter analyze
dart run test/scripts/test_runner.dart unit
```

## Screenshots (if UI changes) | 截图（如涉及 UI）

Attach screenshots here.  
如涉及 UI，请附截图。

## Risks & Rollback | 风险与回退

Describe risks, compatibility concerns, and rollback plan if needed.  
如有必要，请说明风险、兼容性影响和回退方案。

## Checklist | 核对清单

- [ ] I followed `AGENTS.md` and `CLAUDE.md`.｜我已遵循 `AGENTS.md` 与 `CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] I used `appLogger` and avoided `print/debugPrint`.｜我已使用 `appLogger`，未使用 `print/debugPrint`
- [ ] I updated docs when behavior or policy changed.｜行为或规范变化时我已同步更新文档
- [ ] I ran the required checks/tests or explained why not.｜我已执行要求的检查/测试，或已说明未执行原因
- [ ] I did not include secrets or sensitive data.｜我未提交 secrets 或敏感信息
